LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS ROY MILLER, MARIO GALANDE'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION. Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Continued To Feb-09-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS ROY MILLER, MARIO GALANDE'S Motion To Stay Action.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Grant pursuant to defendant's notice of non-opposition filed on April 27, 2021.

Counsel for the plaintiffs is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email:RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
